name: FORGE — Twitter/X Autopilot
description: Handles tweet and thread posting via webhook. Accepts single tweets or full threads. Generates content with Claude if only a brief is provided.

setup.import_instructions: Import into n8n. Add Twitter OAuth credentials under Credentials > Twitter. Activate webhook trigger.

payload_schema.text: For type=tweet: the tweet text (max 280 chars)
payload_schema.tweets: For type=thread: array of tweet strings in order
payload_schema.brief: For type=brief: {topic, angle, key_insight, tone} — Claude generates the tweet
payload_schema.scheduled_at: Optional ISO timestamp for scheduled posting
payload_schema.reply_to_id: Optional tweet ID to reply to

body.system:
={{ $env.FORGE_VOICE_SYSTEM_PROMPT }}

You are writing for Twitter/X. Rules: max 280 chars for single tweets. Direct, specific, no fluff. No exclamation points. No 'excited to share'. Lead with the insight.
